dashboard.label: Query Tester — Monitoring
dashboard.description: Operational dashboard for monitoring product usage, performance, errors, and scheduled runs. Logs are JSON-structured — all fields auto-extracted.

search.query: index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" message="*completed*status=*" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" message="*manual*run*" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" message="Running scheduled test*" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" log_level=ERROR earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" log_level=WARNING earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" message="*completed*duration=*" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex field=message "duration=(?<dur_ms>\d+)ms" | stats avg(dur_ms) as avg_duration | eval avg_duration=round(avg_duration, 0)

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" message="*completed*status=*" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex field=message "status=(?<run_status>\w+)" | timechart count by run_status
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | timechart count by log_level
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count by module | sort - count | head 15

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" message="*completed*status=*" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex field=message "status=(?<run_status>\w+)" | stats count by run_status
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" log_level=ERROR earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count by module | sort - count | head 10

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" message="*completed*duration=*" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex field=message "duration=(?<dur_ms>\d+)ms" | eval dur_bucket=case( dur_ms<1000, "0-1s", dur_ms<5000, "1-5s", dur_ms<15000, "5-15s", dur_ms<30000, "15-30s", dur_ms<60000, "30-60s", 1=1, "60s+") | stats count by dur_bucket | eval sort_order=case(dur_bucket="0-1s",1, dur_bucket="1-5s",2, dur_bucket="5-15s",3, dur_bucket="15-30s",4, dur_bucket="30-60s",5, dur_bucket="60s+",6) | sort sort_order | fields - sort_order

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" message="*completed*duration=*" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | rex field=message "test (?<sched_id>[a-f0-9-]+) completed" | rex field=message "status=(?<run_status>\w+)" | rex field=message "duration=(?<dur_ms>\d+)ms" | eval dur_sec=round(dur_ms/1000, 1) | sort - dur_ms | head 10 | table _time sched_id run_status dur_sec module | rename sched_id as "Schedule ID", run_status as "Status", dur_sec as "Duration (s)", module as "Module"

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" log_level=ERROR earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | eval short_msg=substr(message, 1, 150) | stats count latest(_time) as last_seen by short_msg module | sort - count | head 15 | rename short_msg as "Error Message", module as "Module", count as "Count", last_seen as "Last Seen"

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" module="scheduled_runner" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | eval action=case( like(message, "Enqueued test%"), "Enqueued", like(message, "Processing%queued%"), "Processing", like(message, "Running scheduled test%"), "Running", like(message, "Scheduled test%completed%"), "Completed", like(message, "Skipping%"), "Skipped/Dedup", 1=1, "Other") | timechart count by action
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" module="scheduled_runner" message="Skipping*" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" message="Missed run detected*" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count
index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" message="SPL drift detected*" earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | stats count
| inputlookup saved_tests_lookup | stats count by app | sort - count
| inputlookup saved_tests_lookup | eval type=case( validationType="ijump_alert", "iJump Alert", testType="query_only", "Real Data", 1=1, "Synthetic") | stats count by type
| inputlookup saved_tests_lookup | stats count by createdBy | sort - count | head 15

| inputlookup scheduled_tests_lookup | eval is_enabled=if(enabled="1" OR enabled="true" OR enabled="True", "Yes", "No") | table testName app cronSchedule is_enabled lastRunStatus lastRunAt | sort - lastRunAt | rename testName as "Test", cronSchedule as "Cron", is_enabled as "Enabled", lastRunStatus as "Last Status", lastRunAt as "Last Run"

| inputlookup test_run_history_lookup | sort - ranAt | head 50 | eval dur_sec=round(durationMs/1000, 1) | eval drift=if(splDriftDetected="true" OR splDriftDetected="1", "Yes", "No") | table ranAt ranBy triggerType status dur_sec drift resultSummary | rename ranAt as "Time", ranBy as "User", triggerType as "Trigger", status as "Status", dur_sec as "Duration (s)", drift as "SPL Drift", resultSummary as "Summary"

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" log_level=ERROR earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | sort - _time | head 50 | table _time module message exception | rename module as "Module", message as "Error", exception as "Stack Trace"

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" (module="alerts.alert_email" OR module="alerts.email_utils") earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | eval email_status=case( like(message, "%Failed to send email%"), "Failed", like(message, "%No valid recipients%"), "No Recipients", log_level="ERROR", "Error", 1=1, "OK") | timechart count by email_status

index=_internal source="*query_tester.log" (module="handlers.llm_proxy_handler" OR module="analysis.llm_analyzer") earliest=$time_range.earliest$ latest=$time_range.latest$ | eval llm_status=case( log_level="ERROR", "Error", log_level="WARNING", "Warning", 1=1, "OK") | timechart count by llm_status
